overall.description: First-person shooter gameplay footage showing a player navigating an industrial solar facility. The player moves through narrow corridors between white industrial buildings, interacts with a terminal, discovers a dead body near parked vehicles, and explores elevated walkways with large ventilation equipment and solar concentrator arrays visible in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial facility corridor between white modular buildings

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through narrow passages between industrial buildings while surveying the area

entered.detail: large curved concrete ramp with yellow railings on upper level
tall white modular industrial building with small windows and warning markings
field of reflective solar mirror dishes extending to the horizon

segments.scene_description: The player navigates a narrow corridor between industrial buildings with a curved ramp structure visible to the left. The white modular building dominates the right side while solar concentrator arrays are visible in the distant background under bright midday sun.

scene_state.functional_zone: wall-mounted terminal station on building exterior

events.description: player approaches and interacts with wall-mounted terminal screen displaying orange circular graphics

agents.ego_description: standing at the terminal and interacting with the screen interface

entered.detail: wall-mounted interactive terminal with glowing orange circular display and control buttons

segments.scene_description: The player stops at a wall-mounted terminal and interacts with its glowing orange interface. The surrounding industrial building remains visible while the curved ramp structure is no longer in view.

scene_state.functional_zone: open vehicle parking area with solar farm backdrop

events.description: exits narrow corridor into open area with parked vehicles and equipment
discovers dead body lying on the ground near yellow safety barriers

agents.ego_description: moving through the open area examining the dead body and surrounding vehicles

entered.detail: human figure in gray clothing lying motionless on the ground with blood visible
white commercial van with black logo parked on the asphalt
large black cargo truck with covered bed parked near containers
yellow and gray metal safety railing along platform edge

segments.scene_description: The player emerges into an open parking area where a dead body lies near yellow safety barriers. A white van and black truck are parked nearby, with the solar concentrator array visible in the background under the clear sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: dirt path between shipping containers leading to elevated platform

events.description: begins ascending metal stairs to reach elevated industrial platform

agents.ego_description: walking across dirt ground and climbing metal stairs to upper level

entered.detail: large blue metal shipping container with corrugated sides
industrial metal staircase with yellow railings leading upward

segments.scene_description: The player moves from the asphalt onto a dirt path between shipping containers, then ascends a metal staircase with yellow railings. The solar arrays remain visible in the background as the player climbs to the elevated platform.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated industrial walkway with ventilation and piping systems

events.description: reaches top of stairs and enters elevated industrial platform with large equipment
large industrial drone comes into view hovering near the building structure

agents.ego_description: navigating elevated walkway past industrial pipes and ventilation systems while observing the facility

notable_agents.action: large industrial drone hovering stationary near the building

entered.detail: large green industrial pipes running along the building exterior
massive industrial ventilation system with four circular fans
large cylindrical fuel storage tank with number 03 visible
dark smoke rising from industrial equipment in the distance
large black industrial quadcopter drone hovering near the building

segments.scene_description: The player explores an elevated industrial walkway featuring large green pipes and a massive ventilation unit. A large drone hovers nearby while dark smoke rises in the distance, and fuel storage tanks are visible beyond the platform edge.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from the narrow corridors of an industrial facility into an expansive, elevated overlook of a solar plant. It begins by navigating a tight passage between white modular buildings and a curved ramp, with distant solar concentrator arrays shimmering under a bright midday sun. As the camera pauses to interact with a glowing orange terminal on a wall, the view then opens up into a parking area where a dead body lies near yellow safety barriers and parked vehicles. The movement continues from the asphalt onto a dirt path between shipping containers, ascending a metal staircase with yellow railings to reach a higher vantage point. Finally, the scene shifts to an elevated walkway featuring large green pipes and a massive ventilation unit, where a hovering drone and distant plumes of dark smoke appear above fuel storage tanks.
